prompt: Audit the schemas in schemas/constructs/v1beta1/ against OpenAPI best practices. Check naming conventions, $ref usage, description coverage, response schema consistency, proper use of HTTP status codes, pagination patterns, error response schemas, required field declarations, enum consistency, proper use of format specifiers (uuid, date-time, email, uri), x-oapi-codegen-extra-tags correctness, template file completeness, and whether schemas would produce clean generated code. Give me a full report.

assertions.name: min_5_constructs_audited
assertions.description: At least 5 different v1beta1 constructs were examined

assertions.name: naming_convention_checks
assertions.description: Report checks camelCase properties, PascalCase schemas, kebab-case paths

assertions.name: ref_usage_checks
assertions.description: Report evaluates $ref usage and checks for deprecated core.json references

assertions.name: description_coverage
assertions.description: Report assesses description/documentation coverage on fields

assertions.name: http_status_codes
assertions.description: Report checks proper use of HTTP status codes in responses

assertions.name: pagination_check
assertions.description: Report evaluates pagination patterns across constructs

assertions.name: error_response_check
assertions.description: Report checks for error response schemas

assertions.name: format_specifier_check
assertions.description: Report checks proper use of format specifiers (uuid, date-time, etc.)

assertions.name: codegen_readiness_check
assertions.description: Report assesses whether schemas produce clean generated code

assertions.name: specific_file_references
assertions.description: Report references specific files and line locations, not just general observations

assertions.name: actionable_findings
assertions.description: Report includes actionable recommendations, not just observations
